title: Cosmos Circular Gallery — an animated radial photo wheel (drag to spin, tap to focus)
title_vi: Cosmos Circular Gallery — vòng ảnh xoay kiểu cánh hoa, tâm hiện tấm trên đỉnh
summary: An animated circular gallery: a ring of photo cards fanned like petals around a center, slowly rotating; the card nearest the top is shown big in the center circle with a caption. Hover (desktop) or drag to spin the wheel; click / tap a card to ease it to the top and focus. CSS radial layout + JS for spin/drag/focus, 12 procedural 'landscape' destinations (white-label). Offline, reduced-motion aware.
usage_notes: RUN: open index.html. TECHNIQUES: each slot rotate(θ) translateY(-R) around the ring center; ring rotates via rAF; nearest-to-top detection drives the center image; angular drag (atan2 around center); shortest-path focus spin. INTERACTION: idle=auto-rotate; hover=preview+pause; drag=spin; tap card=focus. TUNE: PAL (palettes/count), radius, spin vel.
summary_vi: Thư viện ảnh tròn động: vòng thẻ ảnh xếp cánh hoa quanh tâm, xoay chậm; tấm gần đỉnh hiện to ở vòng tâm kèm tên. Rê chuột hoặc kéo để xoay; bấm/chạm 1 tấm để đưa lên đỉnh + focus. Bố cục radial CSS + JS. 12 'phong cảnh' procedural (white-label). Offline.
notes: Reference-recreation (Ra) from Alex's IMG_4491 (animated circular gallery). repo cosmos-akashic-effects/web-templates/fx/circular-gallery/.
